announcement.suffix: — Book yours before we close intake.

home.heroTitle: Your Business Deserves a Website That Actually Converts.
home.heroSubtitle: We design and build premium custom websites for ambitious businesses — at 40% below the price of traditional agencies. Only 5 clients accepted per month.
home.svcWebDevDesc: From sleek landing pages to full multi-page business websites. Mobile-first, lightning-fast, and built to turn visitors into customers.
home.svcDesignDesc: We obsess over every pixel. Clean layouts, intuitive flows, and a visual identity that makes your brand look more expensive than it is.
home.svcMarketingDesc: Beautiful websites need to be found. We handle SEO strategy, social presence, and outreach campaigns that drive real leads.
home.notAvgAgencyDesc: Most agencies charge AED 5,000–15,000 for websites that look like templates. We're different. We're a small, focused team of 3 — two developers and one marketing expert — who treat every project like it's our own business. You work directly with the founders. Every time.
home.featureLimit: Limited to 5 clients — your project gets our full focus
home.featureDirect: Direct founder access — no account managers, no middlemen
home.featureCustom: Custom-coded — zero page builders or cheap templates
home.featureTransparent: Transparent pricing — no hidden fees, ever
home.featureSupport: Post-launch support — we don't disappear after delivery
home.processDiscoveryDesc: Free call to understand your goals
home.availabilityTitle: We Work With 5 Clients at a Time. That's It.
home.availabilityDesc: Our small team model means every client gets premium attention. When we're full, intake closes.
home.spotsRefresh: Spots refresh monthly. Next opening: April 2025.
home.testimonial1: They redesigned our entire online presence in 2 weeks. The result was beyond what we expected — and the price was honestly shocking for the quality.
home.testimonial2: Finally an agency that actually listens. They sat with us for an hour just to understand our brand before touching anything. Professional from start to finish.
home.testimonial3: Our old website was embarrassing. This one makes us look like a million-dollar company. Worth every dirham.
home.finalCtaDesc: Book a free 30-minute discovery call. No pressure. No pitch. Just a real conversation about your business.
home.svcAi: AI Chatbots, Voice Agents & Smart Automation
home.svcAiDesc: Imagine having a team member who works 24/7, never takes a day off, answers every customer question instantly, and can even call your clients to book appointments — all automatically. That's what we build. From AI chat assistants to voice agents that hold real conversations, we create smart systems that save your business time and money.

services.heroSubtitle: Three core disciplines. One focused team. Premium results across the board.
services.svc1Title: Websites Built to Convert, Not Just to Look Pretty.
services.svc1Body: We build every website from scratch — no page builders, no bloated themes. Every project is coded with React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS for blazing performance, full SEO readiness, and mobile-first responsiveness. Your site will load fast, rank well, and actually convert visitors into paying customers.
services.svc2Title: Design That Makes Your Brand Look Worth 10x More.
services.svc2Body: We design every page in Figma first — full desktop and mobile layouts with interactive prototypes. From wireframes to final brand identity, we obsess over every pixel so your business looks polished, premium, and unforgettable. You review and approve everything before we write a single line of code.
services.svc3Title: Get Found. Get Leads. Get Results.
services.svc3Body: A beautiful website that nobody visits is just art. We handle SEO strategy, social media presence, and outreach campaigns that drive real, qualified leads to your business. From Google rankings to Instagram growth — we make sure the right people find you.
services.pricingSubtitle: No hidden fees. No surprises. Just honest pricing for premium work.
services.svc4Title: AI Chatbots, Voice Agents & Smart Automation
services.svc4Body: Imagine having a team member who works 24/7, never takes a day off, answers every customer question instantly, and can even call your clients to book appointments — all automatically. That's what we build. From AI chat assistants to voice agents that hold real conversations, we create smart systems that save your business time and money.

howWeWork.step1Body: Every project begins with a free 30-minute call. We want to understand your business, your audience, your goals, and what success looks like for you. No templates. No assumptions.
howWeWork.step1Deliverables: Project brief, scope of work, timeline
howWeWork.step2Body: Once we understand your goals, we create a full project roadmap — sitemap, content structure, and technical plan. You see and approve everything before we touch any design.
howWeWork.step2Deliverables: Sitemap, content plan, tech stack decision
howWeWork.step3Body: We design every page in Figma first. Full desktop and mobile layouts. You get a live Figma link to review, comment, and approve. We don't move to development until you love it.
howWeWork.step4Body: We build your site from scratch — no page builders, no bloated plugins. Custom React components, optimised for speed, SEO, and mobile performance.
howWeWork.step4Deliverables: Staged preview link, testing on all devices
howWeWork.step5Body: We share a live staging link. You review everything. We make your requested changes. This process repeats until you're 100% satisfied.
howWeWork.step6Body: Once you approve, we handle full deployment — domain connection, SSL, speed optimisation, and final SEO setup. We stay on call for 30 days post-launch.
howWeWork.comm1Desc: Short calls to keep you updated on progress and next steps.
howWeWork.comm2Desc: Message the team anytime — no ticketing systems or delays.
howWeWork.comm3Desc: See real-time progress updates with full transparency.
howWeWork.ctaDesc: Book a free discovery call and let's map out your project together.

about.heroTitle: We're Not an Agency. We're Builders.
about.storyP1: We started Aureon because we were tired of seeing small businesses overpaying for websites that looked like everyone else's. We're a team of three friends who are obsessed with quality, fairness, and doing work we're actually proud of.
about.storyP2: We keep our client list small on purpose. We'd rather do 5 things perfectly than 50 things badly.
about.quote: "We'd rather do 5 things perfectly than 50 things badly."
about.value1Desc: We limit clients so every project gets our full attention. No rushing, no cutting corners.
about.value2Desc: You always know what we're doing and why. No black boxes, no vague timelines.
about.value3Desc: Premium output should not require a premium price. Great design is a right, not a luxury.
about.foundersSubtitle: You work with us — not an account manager.
about.founder1Bio: Shubhan is the driving force behind Aureon. A full-stack developer and co-founder, he leads the company's vision while staying hands-on with every build. He believes great software is equal parts clean code and sharp thinking — and brings both to every project.
about.founder2Bio: Aabaan is the technical backbone of Aureon — and one of the few developers his age who has actually built and deployed full AI systems in the real world. From AI platforms and voice agents to multi-agent automation systems, he architects everything from the ground up. If it's fast, smart, and built to last — that's Aabaan's work.
about.founder3Bio: Abhay is the reason clients find us — and the reason they stay. He drives all business development and manages every client relationship from first call to final delivery, making sure the experience feels as premium as the product itself.
about.ctaDesc: We'd love to hear about your project. Book a free call and let's chat.

projects.heroSubtitle: Real projects. Real results. See what we've built for our clients.
projects.proj1Title: NeuroForge AI — Full AI Super Platform
projects.proj1Desc: A complete AI platform with chatbots, voice agents, notebook tools, and full API access — all in one place.
projects.proj1Challenge: Most AI tools are scattered across different websites and apps. Users waste time switching between ChatGPT for chat, another tool for voice, another for notes. There was no single place that brought everything together in one clean platform.
projects.proj1Solution: We built NeuroForge AI from scratch — a unified AI super-platform that gives users everything in one place. You can have full AI conversations like ChatGPT, use a voice agent that speaks back to you naturally, take notes with AI assistance, AND access the platform's own API to plug the AI into your own apps and websites. Think of it as your personal AI command centre.
projects.proj1Results: A fully functional AI platform that non-technical users and developers can both use. Demonstrates our ability to build production-grade AI systems end to end.
projects.proj2Title: Aabaan's Kitchen — AI Recipe Platform with Smart Chef Agents
projects.proj2Desc: A premium recipe platform where multiple AI agents work together — from analysing your fridge to planning your entire week of meals.
projects.proj2Challenge: Cooking apps are either too simple or too complicated. Most just show you a list of recipes. Nobody built something that actually thinks with you — understanding what you have at home, how you're feeling, and what you should cook based on your real life.
projects.proj2Solution:
We built a full AI-powered kitchen platform with 3 specialist AI agents working together:

🧑‍🍳 Zesty — Your personal kitchen buddy. Remembers your preferences, cheers you on, speaks to you like a friend (with voice mode), and plans your full week of meals.

🎨 Recipe Editor — Modify any recipe instantly. Tell it 'make this vegan' or 'scale to 8 people' and it rewrites the recipe live on screen.

👨‍🍳 Sous-Chef — A professional cooking assistant that answers questions about techniques, ingredients, and wine pairings anytime you cook.

Plus: take a photo of your fridge and AI tells you exactly what you can cook with what's inside. No more wasted food.
projects.proj2Results: A fully working multi-agent AI food platform that shows how AI can enhance everyday life in a way anyone can enjoy — even people who have never used AI before.
projects.proj3Title: GameVerse — 25+ Browser Games with Hand Tracking & Motion Controls
projects.proj3Desc: A game centre featuring 25+ responsive browser games — including games you control with your hands, face, and body movements through your camera.
projects.proj3Challenge: Browser games are usually boring, outdated, and all look the same. Nobody was pushing what's possible in a web browser — especially with new technologies like hand tracking and motion detection.
projects.proj3Solution: We built GameVerse — a full game centre with 25+ custom-built games ranging from classic arcade to completely unique experiences that use your camera to track your hands, face expressions, and body movements as the controller. No downloads. No app needed. Just open in a browser and play.
projects.proj3Results: A showcase of what modern web development is capable of. Proof that a website can feel like a console game.
projects.proj4Title: Personal Portfolio — AI-Powered Developer & Culinary Blog
projects.proj4Desc: A personal portfolio with a built-in AI assistant that knows everything about the developer and can answer questions on his behalf.
projects.proj4Challenge: Standard portfolios are static and fail to truly engage visitors. The goal was to build a site that not only displayed projects but also actively demonstrated AI capability.
projects.proj4Solution: Built a premium dark-mode portfolio complete with an interactive career roadmap, culinary showcase, and an integrated AI assistant trained specifically on the developer's background to answer visitor queries in real time.
projects.proj4Results: A hyper-interactive personal site demonstrating mastery over frontend visuals and practical AI integration.
projects.proj5Desc: Professional website for a multi-speciality clinic with online appointment booking.
projects.proj5Challenge: Patients found it hard to book appointments and find doctor information.
projects.proj5Solution: Clean, accessible design with doctor profiles, service pages, and booking integration.
projects.proj6Desc: Website and digital marketing package for a boutique fitness studio.
projects.proj6Challenge: Great facility but zero online presence and no lead generation.
projects.proj6Solution: Built a vibrant website with class schedules, trainer profiles, and a Google Ads strategy.
projects.proj6Results: 80 new members in the first 2 months.

contact.heroSubtitle: Tell us about your project and we'll get back to you within a few hours.
contact.messageSentDesc: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you within 4 hours.
contact.formPrivacy: 🔒 Your information is never shared. We respond within 4 hours.
contact.descRequired: Please tell us a bit about your project
contact.calendlyDesc: Select a 30-minute slot below — it's completely free.
contact.descPlaceholder: Tell us about your business and what you're looking to build...

faq.q1: How much does a website cost?
faq.a1: Our projects start at {{price}} for a clean, professional landing page. Pricing scales based on pages, features, and complexity. We're always 40–50% below what a typical agency would charge for the same quality. We'll give you a clear quote after a free discovery call.
faq.q2: How long does a project take?
faq.a2: Most websites are delivered in 2–4 weeks. Simpler projects can be done in under 2 weeks. We'll give you a clear timeline before we start.
faq.q3: Why only 5 clients at a time?
faq.a3: Because we refuse to compromise on quality. When you work with us, you're not one of 50 clients. You're one of 5. That means faster communication, more attention to detail, and a better final product.
faq.q4: Do you use templates or page builders?
faq.a4: Never. Every website we build is custom-coded from scratch using React, Next.js, and Tailwind CSS. No Wix, no WordPress templates, no drag-and-drop shortcuts.
faq.q5: Will my website work on mobile?
faq.a5: Yes — fully responsive design is standard on every single project we deliver. We test on all major screen sizes and devices.
faq.q6: What happens after the website launches?
faq.a6: We provide 30 days of post-launch support for all projects. Any bugs, tweaks, or small updates during that period are handled at no extra cost.
faq.q7: Can you help with content (text and images)?
faq.a7: We can guide you on content structure and copywriting direction. For photography, we recommend using professional stock photography or your own brand images, which we'll help you select.
faq.a8: Simply book a free 30-minute call using the Contact page. We'll discuss your project, answer any questions, and tell you if we're a good fit.
faq.a9: Yes. We offer monthly maintenance retainers for updates, security, and performance monitoring. Pricing starts at {{price}}/month.
faq.a10: Yes — we're a Dubai-based team! However, we work with clients across the UAE and internationally via Zoom/Google Meet.
faq.ctaDesc: Our team is ready to answer them on a quick call.

footer.desc: We design and build premium custom websites for ambitious businesses — at 40–50% below market price. Only 5 clients at a time.

chat.greeting: Hi! 👋 I'm the AI assistant for Aureon. Ask me anything about our services, pricing, process, or availability — I'm here to help!
chat.qr2: How long does a website take?
chat.qr5: I want to book a call
chat.sessionLimit: For more help, please book a free call with our team → Visit our Contact page!

aiService.heroTitle: AI That Works While You Sleep.
aiService.heroSubtitle: We build intelligent systems that handle real tasks — answering customers, booking appointments, recommending products, and more. No technical knowledge needed on your end. We handle everything.
aiService.block1Title: A Smart Assistant for Your Website — Available 24/7.
aiService.block1Body: Think of it like hiring a brilliant receptionist who is always online, always polite, and knows everything about your business. A customer visits your website at 2am with a question? Your AI assistant answers instantly — no waiting, no missed leads. We build these assistants to sound natural, understand your customers, and push them towards booking or buying.
block1Bullets: Learn your business deeply so answers are always accurate
aiService.block2Title: An AI That Actually Calls Your Customers and Closes Sales.
aiService.block2Body: This is not a robot reading a script. Our voice agents hold real, natural phone conversations — they can call your leads, introduce your business, answer questions, book appointments and even follow up with customers after a sale. It sounds human, it thinks fast, and it works around the clock. Imagine having a sales team that never sleeps and never asks for a salary.
block2Bullets: Make outbound calls to your leads
Follow up with customers after purchase
aiService.block3Title: AI That Doesn't Just Answer — It Thinks and Acts.
aiService.block3Body: Regular chatbots just answer questions. Agentic AI goes further — it takes real actions. It can browse the internet, process orders, update your spreadsheets, send emails, analyse data, and make decisions — all on its own. We build complete AI systems that run entire parts of your business automatically. You just watch it work.
block3Bullets: Send emails and follow-ups on its own
Browse the web to gather information
Analyse your sales data and report back
Connect all your tools and apps together
Make smart decisions based on real data
aiService.block4Title: Making All Your Tools Work Together Seamlessly.
aiService.block4Body: You know how sometimes your website, your WhatsApp, your booking system, and your payment app all feel disconnected? We fix that. We build the invisible bridges between all your tools so they talk to each other automatically. An order comes in on your website → your WhatsApp gets notified → your inventory updates → customer gets a confirmation email. All without you touching anything.
block4Bullets: Connect your website to any external tool or service
Automate notifications and updates across platforms
Integrate payment systems, CRMs, booking tools
Make your existing tools 10x more powerful
aiService.specialistBody: All AI and automation work at Aureon is led by Aabaan Rahil Ghaffar — Co-Founder & CTO. Aabaan has built full AI platforms, voice agents, multi-agent systems, and intelligent automation tools from the ground up. When you work with us on AI, you're working directly with someone who has actually built these systems — not someone who just read about them.
